name: "Audition for the Rainbooms" — Rainbow Dash
description:
After several successful concerts and the adventures at Camp Everfree, The Rainbooms have decided to take their music to the next level. Their new material is more complex and powerful, and they've realized they need a dedicated bass guitarist to achieve the full, rich sound they're aiming for. As the band's driven leader, Rainbow Dash has taken charge of finding the right person to complete their lineup.

[post-Legend of Everfree]
creator: Kitayama
